name: Plastic
description: An early concept for Plastic, discovered from a user answer about Plasticapple.

attributes.name: edibility
attributes.value: The user says Plastic cannot be eaten.

attributes.name: material_property
attributes.value: The user says Plastic can be used as a material.

open_questions.question: Plastic 是什么？它为什么不能吃？它还有哪些特性？
open_questions.last_answer: Plastic is a material, not a fruit. Plastic is not food. Plastic can be used to make containers, packaging, or toys.

open_questions.question: Plastic 是什么材料？它有哪些特性？
open_questions.last_answer: Plastic is a material, not a fruit. Plastic is not food. Plastic can be used to make containers, packaging, or toys.

open_questions.question: Plastic 是什么？它和当前学习主题有什么关系？
Plastic 被 PlasticApple 通过“made-of”联系起来。这说明 Plastic 和 PlasticApple 有什么关系？
open_questions.last_answer: 塑料苹果不是水果，而是由塑料制成、外形像苹果的物体。它可能在颜色或形状上像苹果，但不能作为食物食用。

open_questions.question: Plastic 被 PlasticApple 等概念通过“made-of”联系起来。这说明 Plastic 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: 塑料苹果不是水果，而是由塑料制成、外形像苹果的物体。它可能在颜色或形状上像苹果，但不能作为食物食用。

open_questions.question: Plastic 是不是一种 Fruit，还是和 Fruit 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Plastic is a material, not a fruit. Plastic is not food. Plastic can be used to make containers, packaging, or toys.

open_questions.question: Plastic 是不是一种 Nutrient，还是和 Nutrient 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Nutrient is not a fruit. Nutrient is a general category for substances that support BodyFunction and Health. Vitamin is a nutrient. Mineral is a nutrient. DietaryFiber is a nutrient. Potassium is a nutrient.

open_questions.question: Plastic 是由什么构成的？它有哪些材料或物理特性？
open_questions.last_answer: Plastic is a material, not a fruit. Plastic is not food. Plastic can be used to make containers, packaging, or toys.

open_questions.question: 为什么 Plastic 不能吃？这个原因和我已经知道的哪些概念有关？
open_questions.last_answer: Plastic is a material, not a fruit. Plastic is not food. Plastic can be used to make containers, packaging, or toys.
